name: ai.justdrop/mcp
description: Live, end-to-end encrypted, ephemeral file transfer between your AI agent and any device. No accounts, nothing stored — the other side just needs a browser.

environmentVariables.name: JUSTDROP_ROOT
environmentVariables.description: The only directory the server may read files from or save files into (root jail). Defaults to the working directory.

environmentVariables.name: JUSTDROP_DEFAULT_EXPIRY_MINUTES
environmentVariables.description: Room lifetime in minutes when a tool call doesn't specify one (1-1440, default 60).
